subject: Luke's Landspeeder miniatures
notes: Local Landspeeder research supports a substantial studio miniature around 97 cm and roughly 1/4 scale; user confirmation in this project closes the floor at two ANH miniatures apart from the full-size prop, though their exact identities remain unresolved.

subject: large Blockade Runner / Tantive IV
notes: The local corpus consistently distinguishes a larger, more detailed model from the small one; exact shot count remains debated.

subject: small Blockade Runner / recession model
notes: Heritage explicitly identifies a one-of-a-kind 16-inch miniature for the opening recession shot; local discussion agrees the smaller model is real and screen-used.

subject: possible third tiny Blockade Runner for hangar / tractor-beam context
notes: Local discussion raises the possibility of a third model small enough to fit inside the Star Destroyer hangar context, but this is not yet closed.

subject: main Death Star sphere
notes: Best local reconstruction points to a 36-inch main model with an 8-9 inch dish, smooth painted surface, and only one fully finished viewing side.

subject: general Death Star surface panel system
notes: Multiple auction records directly confirm a large family of interlocking biscuit-foam Death Star surface pieces and smaller surface elements.
source_codes: PS-DS-SURFACE-2018; PS-DS-SURFACE-2021; HA-DS-SURFACE-2024A; HA-DS-SURFACE-2024B; HA-DS-SURFACE-2025; RPF-DS-PROD

subject: low-altitude two-foot Death Star tiles
notes: Auction material proves large 24x24 low-altitude panels existed; local fan reconstruction points toward six original low-altitude two-footer tiles.

subject: medium-altitude Death Star panels
notes: Propstore explicitly distinguishes medium-altitude surface sections from low-altitude material, implying multiple Death Star surface sub-families.

subject: equatorial trench / hangar-bay light backwall system
what_seems_to_exist: trench backwall with rectangular light openings
notes: Local Death Star research strongly supports a distinct clear backwall/light system in the trench, with the surviving archive state appearing altered.

subject: Death Star turbolaser / gun towers
notes: Auction records from 2016 and 2024 confirm ANH biscuit-foam gun tower / turbolaser miniatures with detachable turret tops; Paul Huston identifies the Death Star cannon as the key model in ILM's first completed shot.

subject: special trench crane miniature
object_type: likely single object or small family
notes: The local thread treats this as a real one-shot Death Star surface structure rather than a fan invention.

subject: special trench silo / tower structures
what_seems_to_exist: silo-like special towers separate from gun towers
notes: The local tower thread makes a convincing case that these are a separate special-structure family and not just misunderstood gun towers.

subject: Death Star docking bay gantry / hangar accent
notes: Local gantry research says the replica is based on a behind-the-scenes photo showing the original miniature being built and attributes the original to Jon Erland.

subject: other special Death Star sections, possibly including hangar crane / deflection-tower-type pieces
notes: The local corpus keeps surfacing odd named or half-seen Death Star structures beyond standard tiles and gun towers, but counts remain open.

subject: Escape Pod miniature
notes: The local Escape Pod research is detailed enough to treat the pod as a real, discrete ANH miniature lineage; blueprint evidence dates the design to September 25, 1975.

subject: Escape Pod launch / jettison support setup
object_type: support element, not necessarily separate miniature
notes: Local notes that the pod was weighted nose-heavy for the launch shot imply a shot-specific launch setup, but not yet a separate miniature count.

subject: Sandcrawler miniature
notes: StarWars.com and the local thread support a real Sandcrawler filming miniature built at ILM with substantial tank-drive hardware.

subject: Sandcrawler live-action lower-hull / matte composite solution
notes: Not part of the miniature census proper, but useful for separating the miniature's job from the live-action / matte solution.
